sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81679" key="perima/ktria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιμάκτρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">περιμάσσω</etym>) <sense id="n81679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one that purifies by magic</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γραῦς π</foreign>. a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">witch</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.166a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
